company: GE Medical Systems Ultrasound and Primary Care Diagnostics
intended_use: EchoPAC Software Only / EchoPAC Plug-in is intended for diagnostic review and analysis of ultrasound images, patient record management and reporting, for use by, or on the order of a licensed physicia
intended_use_full: EchoPAC Software Only / EchoPAC Plug-in is intended for diagnostic review and analysis of ultrasound images, patient record management and reporting, for use by, or on the order of a licensed physician. EchoPAC Software Only / EchoPAC Plug-in allows post-processing of raw data images from GE ultrasound scanners and DICOM ultrasound images.
target_condition: Cardiac and general ultrasound imaging analysis
ground_truth: Manual measurements reviewed by two cardiologists following US ASE-based annotation guidelines, with consensus review by panel of five clinical experts
other_metrics: Feasibility score >95%; Mean absolute percent error across cardiac cycles passed acceptance criteria; Tissue Doppler mean performance metric -0.002 (SD = 0.077) for BMI < 25 and -0.006 (SD = 0.081) for BMI ≥ 25; Flow Doppler means 0.021 (SD = 0.073) and 0.003 (SD = 0.057) respectively for BMI < 25 and ≥ 25
